module.name: no-object-mutation
module.description: Disallow direct object-property mutation; prefer creating new objects with immutable update patterns.

scenarios.name: should allow object spread to create an updated copy
should allow Object.assign into a fresh object literal
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the call expression

scenarios.name: should report assigning to an object property via dot notation
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the assignment expression

scenarios.name: should report assigning to an object property via bracket notation
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the assignment expression

scenarios.name: should report a delete operation on an object property
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the unary expression
